name: Microwave Couscous
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 cups of water in a microwave-safe pot until boiling.
2. Stir in the couscous and heat for an additional minute.
3. Fluff the mixture with a fork, cover, and microwave for 15 minutes.
4. In another microwave-safe dish, cook your chosen vegetables (e.g., fresh broccoli and carrots) with a little water until tender.
5. Microwave a can of beans (without the can) until warmed.
6. Serve the beans over the couscous and garnish with the cooked vegetables.
The meal takes approximately 20 minutes to prepare.
